title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delhi University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
